## Goal

What chapter, section, or writing outcome should this issue produce?

## Inputs

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Target section or document updated
- [ ] Citations checked
- [ ] Corpus claims grounded in canonical data
- [ ] Open research gaps listed if still unresolved
